subcodes.first_line: O thou leaf who supplicates and is assured! Some believe that men are superior to women, based on the blessed verse concerning men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبتهله موقنه قومی بر آنند که رجال افضل از نساء و بایه مبارکه الرجال
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @firmness in the Covenant
